text: Expose non-interactive, self-documenting commands that AI agents can discover and invoke safely. Evidence: direct — the owner requires an agent-facing self-documenting CLI with deployable skills; workflow UC-LEDGER-006.
target: Every Ledger command provides help and a versioned machine-readable schema, accepts deterministic non-interactive input, emits structured results/errors on documented streams, uses stable exit codes, and rejects incompatible skill contracts before mutation.
